# icons — Changelog

> Diff structurel de l'API (selectors, inputs, outputs, models) entre versions stables, jusqu'à `v21.2.2`. Les versions sans changement d'API sont omises.

## 21.1.0

+ selector `pr-icon`

## 21.0.0

Composant introduit (`IconComponent`).

## Notes de release (ZeroHeight)

# icons — Changelog

### 21.2.2

#### Added

- `moneyIban`, `signDecimal`, and `signTag` icons.

### 21.1.4

#### Added

- `bubbleSpeechStrikethrough`, `deviceTablet`, and `signRating` icons.

### 21.1.3

#### Added

- `listMultipleChoices` and `signSimpleChoice` icons.

### 21.0.3

#### Added

- `files`, `mathsNotEqual`, and `peopleHouse` icons.

### 20.3.0

#### Added

- `AI` input to apply the AI visual treatment (`mod-AI` CSS class) to an icon.

### 20.2.1

#### Added

- `arrowOppositeHorizontal`, `arrowOppositeLeftRight`, `arrowOppositeRightLeft`, `arrowOppositeTopBottom`, and `bubbleStars` icons.

#### Changed

- `peopleFolder` icon updated visually.

### 20.1.3

#### Added

- `peopleFolder` icon.

### 20.1.2

#### Added

- `mapTripStep`, `officeMicrophone`, and `playerRecording` icons.

### 20.1.0

#### Added

- `moneyPaymentCards` icon.

### 19.3.4

#### Added

- `signCheckbox`, `transportCarElectric`, `transportMotocycle`, `transportMotocycleElectric`, `transportScooter`, and `transportScooterElectric` icons.

### 19.3.1

#### Added

- `appWidget` and `cornersFocus` icons.

### 19.3.0

#### Added

- `peopleAccessibility` icon.

#### Changed

- Icon display changed from `inline-flex` to `inline-block`.

### 19.2.6

#### Added

- `officePenStar` icon.

### 19.2.5

#### Added

- `peopleEdit` and `signAt` icons.

### 19.2.0

#### Added

- `emojiSmile` and `soundMegaphone` icons.

### 19.1.6

#### Added

- `mapPlan` and `officeFirstAid` icons.

### 19.1.5

#### Added

- `peopleAdd`, `peopleArrowUp`, and `peopleGroup` icons.

### 18.2.4

#### Added

- `signWebhook` icon.

### 18.2.0

#### Added

- `arrowLineBottom`, `arrowLineTop`, and `medicalDoctor` icons.

### 18.1.3

#### Added

- `--icon-fontFamily` CSS custom property to override the icon font family.

### 18.1.2

#### Added

- `arrowCenterReduce`, `arrowCornerExpand`, `filePlus`, `foodCutlery`, `moneyBankImport`, `moneyCheck`, `signShieldError`, `signShieldSuccess`, `signShieldWarning`, and `weatherStars` icons.

### 18.1.1

#### Added

- `arrowCurvedDownRight`, `moneyCardCheck`, and `signTranslation` icons.
